text:
Neither the kern.flp from 3.2 or 3.3 will boot at all the boot.flp from
2.2.8 will start to load the kernel then die befor the segment sizes are
shown.

I saw the note on device probing on a compaq and that does not seem
the prob with 3.X but might be with 2.2.8.

How-To-Repeat: Try any stable and/or current distrubtion installation floppies
